indicators.name: counter
indicators.rationale: The counter is too low for comfortable sitting and working.

indicators.name: sink
indicators.rationale: The sink is too close to the counter, making it difficult to set up a workspace.

indicators.name: vase
indicators.rationale: The vase is decorative and not functional for workspace setup.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: There is no chair available for sitting and working.

indicators.name: towel
indicators.rationale: The towel is decorative and not functional for workspace setup.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The low counter and sink make it difficult to set up a workspace, and there is no chair or towel available for sitting and working. The presence of decorative objects like the vase and towel further detracts from the workspace setup.
